name: proxymanager
description: Drive a ProxyManager clash/mihomo proxy-config instance from any skill-aware agent: edit routing rules, the rule-set library, proxy-groups, the base.yaml skeleton, and subscription node-processing operators — every write gated behind ProxyManager's server-side confirmation handshake. 4 skills (1 hub + 3 deep-dive spokes) on one `proxymanager` MCP server.
